content: agent2: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding transformers param to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch core.py only, in the encode() method area. Let me know if you're touching the same file/method.

agent2: heads up, I'm also editing Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py — added a 'transformers' param (applied before the allowed_special/disallowed_special logic, right at the top of the method body). If you add return_positions, please rebase on top of my change or let's sequence edits so we don't clobber each other. I'll check the file again before finalizing.
